# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release receives security fixes. Once a fix is available it will be tagged as a new patch or minor release according to the severity.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | yes       |
| older   | no        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Contact the maintainer directly at the email address listed on the [GitHub profile](https://github.com/MarwanAlsoltany). Please include:

- A clear description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce or a minimal proof of concept.
- The potential impact (what an attacker could achieve).
- Any suggested mitigations, if you have them.

You will receive an acknowledgement within 72 hours. If a fix is warranted, a patched release will be published as soon as reasonably possible and you will be credited in the release notes unless you prefer to remain anonymous.
